title: Paying at the Hospital 缴费

lines.en: Excuse me. Where can I pay for the medicine?
Right here. Can I see your prescription?
lines.zh: 就在这里。请给我看一下处方。

lines.en: Here it is. How much do I need to pay?
OK. I have paid. Here is the receipt.
lines.zh: 好的。我已经付了。这是收据。

lines.en: Thank you. Take this paper to the pharmacy.
lines.zh: 谢谢。拿这张单子去药房取药。

lines.en: Is the pharmacy on the first floor?
Yes, go straight and turn left. You will see it.
lines.zh: 是的，直走左转就看到了。
